name: Crawfish Casserole
recipeIngredient: 1 (10 3/4 oz) can cream of mushroom soup
1 tablespoon garlic powder, or to taste
recipeInstructions:
1. In a double boiler, melt the stick of butter and add the cubed cream cheese. Stir over low heat until the cheese is melted.
2. In a separate skillet, melt 2 tablespoons margarine and sauté the crawfish tails, onions, bell pepper, and mushrooms until the vegetables are tender.
3. Add the mushroom soup and cooked rice to the skillet. Stir in garlic powder and red pepper flakes.
4. Mix in the cream cheese and margarine mixture from step 1.
5. Pour the casserole into a greased baking dish. Top with grated Velvetta cheese and fried onion rings.
6. Bake in a 350°F oven for 30 minutes or until bubbly. This recipe freezes well. Shrimp can also be substituted for the crawfish.
